release_notes: Streamlined Credit Sales & Debt Management: POS credit stays on checkout (select/create customer, searchable picker), auto debt linked to sale_id+receipt+customer (no orphans), payment validation, debt table Sale Date + row→sale details, partial payments + history with reference, void credit with payments warning, audit on debt payments. Built on Standardized Dropdowns 2.3.58, Cash Rounding 2.3.53, Payment Variance. No Setup/GitHub Release publish.
